steps.title: Use aim plus method
steps.content: The student wants LIGO's aim and methodology. The notes give the aim as detecting and analyzing gravitational waves, and the method as using two massive interferometers thousands of miles apart.

steps.title: Exclude outcome-only details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on the 2015 detection. Choice B emphasizes timing. Choice C gives the method but does not clearly state the aim. The strongest choice combines LIGO's purpose with its interferometer method. The answer is D.
